allow: Bash(py -3 -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\) or print\('OK:', f\) for f in ['neuroslm/brain.py', 'neuroslm/train.py', 'neuroslm/intelligence/orchestrator.py']]")

Bash(python -c "import json; nb=json.load\(open\('colab_run.ipynb',encoding='utf-8'\)\); [print\(i, c['source'][:80] if isinstance\(c['source'],str\) else ''.join\(c['source']\)[:80]\) for i,c in enumerate\(nb['cells']\)]")
Bash(python -c "import json; f=open\('colab_run.ipynb'\); nb=json.load\(f\); f.close\(\); [print\(repr\(''.join\(c['source']\)\)\) for c in nb['cells'] if c.get\('id'\)=='3c7c310c']")
Bash(py -c "import json; f=open\('colab_run.ipynb'\); nb=json.load\(f\); f.close\(\); src=''.join\([c for c in nb['cells'] if c.get\('id'\)=='3c7c310c'][0]['source']\); print\(src\)")

Bash(py -c "import json; f=open\('colab_run.ipynb',encoding='utf-8'\); nb=json.load\(f\); f.close\(\); src=''.join\([c for c in nb['cells'] if c.get\('id'\)=='3c7c310c'][0]['source']\); print\(src\)")

PowerShell(py -c "import json,sys; f=open\('colab_run.ipynb',encoding='utf-8'\); nb=json.load\(f\); f.close\(\); src=''.join\([c for c in nb['cells'] if c.get\('id'\)=='3c7c310c'][0]['source']\); sys.stdout.buffer.write\(src.encode\('utf-8'\)\)")
